steps.title: Identify the repeated change
steps.content:
Having $3.2\%$ more money each year means the account is multiplied by $1.032$ each year:
$$
\text{new amount}=1.032(\text{previous amount})
$$

steps.title: Classify the model
steps.content: Repeated multiplication by a constant factor is exponential, not linear. Since $1.032>1$, the amount increases over time. The answer is C.
